title: Sales & Service Fees (Budget Account Only) Revenues from fees charged to students and the general public for sales and services by the institution.
Continuing Education Course Fees Revenues from fees charged for attending Continuing Education courses.
Other Sales & Service Fees Revenues from fees charged for other sales and services.
Conferencing Revenue Fees for conferences held in the institution Conference Center.
Department Sales/Facilities Continuing Education Facility rental fee revenue
Fines (Budget Account Only) Receipts of income resulting from fines imposed for violations of the institution’s established regulations.
Library Fines Receipts of income resulting from fines imposed for violations of the institution’s established regulations for library operations.
Other Fines Receipts of income resulting from fines imposed for violations of the institution’s established regulations, not including library fines.
Other Educational Sales & Services Revenues from educational sales and services not defined elsewhere.
Rents Revenue received for the rental of rooms, conference rooms, residence hall rooms, apartments, or rental of any other assets owned by the institution.
P3 Project Base Rent Used to record rent revenues for P3 Auxiliary Project
P3 Project Retained Services Rent Used to record retained services revenue associated with the P3 Auxiliary Project: Resident’s Life, Security, Grounds, etc.

Sales Revenue received from sales of all types, including advertising space in printed materials or electronic media, sales of tickets for admission to athletic or theatrical events, sales (other than room and board) of merchandise and concessions.
Sales-Wholesale Used by the bookstore when selling textbooks to independent buyers because they cannot be returned.
Sales-Ads-Mens Athletic Program Men’s Basketball Advertising Sales
Sales-Ads-Womens Program Women’s Basketball Advertising Sales
Card-Replacement Charge ID Card Replacement Charge
Card-Commission Commission from use of Student Campus Card
Card-Student Meals Block Meal Plans-ID Card

Athletic Revenue Revenue received from fees charged for extracurricular activities and services not included in account “4071xx Student Athletic Fees.” An example of this type of revenue would be fees charged for Athletic Camps.

Health Service Revenue Revenue received from fees charged for health service not included in account “4061xx Student Health Fees.” Other Health Service Revenues are from lab fees, fees for immunizations, and other fees for additional services.
Men’s and Women’s Health Health Clinic Charges
